code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import"./blog.css";import backgroundImage from"../../images/blogimages/blogBackground.jpg";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Blogs=_ref=>{let{localHost,heroku}=_ref;const[blogs,setBlogs]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{fetch("".concat(heroku,"/blogs")).then(response=>response.json()).then(data=>setBlogs(data));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"blogs",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"title",children:"Blogs"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"blog-container",children:blogs.map(blog=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"blog",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:"".concat(heroku,"/").concat(blog.img_url),alt:"test",className:"blog-image"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"blog-title",children:blog.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"blog-description",children:blog.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/blogs/".concat(blog.slug),className:"blog-a",children:"Read More"})]},blog.id))})]});};export default Blogs;
